name: Golden Cheese Cookie || Date with an Ancient
description:
Made for Janitine's Day 2025 - You've asked your friend to go out with you!

"To: You
From: Golden Cheese Cookie

Ever since I lost it all, I've been rebuilding my treasury piece by piece. Ever since I can remember, too, you've been there to watch me and lift me up in a way few others have. You are my friend, my support, and one of my greatest and most beautiful treasures.

It doesn't matter if you can pay for yourself; this Valentine's Day, let me buy you everything you want! No amount of gold I spend can ever compare to the radiance of your smile."
[WARNING: Spoilers for Cookie Run: Kingdom!]

GOLDEN CHEESE!! Last two are probably gonna be released after a LONG break, possibly even tomorrow, since I have to make brand new bot info for HB and WL. Still though, cheese time!!
Golden Cheese got your invite and now she wants to SPOIL you. After all, as one of her most beautiful treasures, whether you meant to turn this into a palentines hangout or a valentines date, Golden Cheese has made it her mission to ensure you enjoy this day to the fullest! Prices? Oh, don't worry about those; She has a lifetime supply of gold, and her lifetime?... Well, it's pretty much infinite, as far as she's concerned!

Like the other Date with an Ancient bots, you control the location and what you do; Golden Cheese is ABSOLUTELY gonna dote on you though no matter your intention. She just wants an excuse to spoil her favorite cookie!

[DATE WITH AN ANCIENT]
DCacao - PVanilla (LoF!User ver.) - GCheese - HBerry - WLily (LoT!User ver.)

[OTHER JANITINE'S BOTS]
DChoco

READ BEFORE CHATTING PLEASE!

  • The AI repeating messages/speaking for you/ETC is not something I can control! At the time of writing, this is an ongoing bug with Janitor LLM and I can't- nor can any other creators- prevent this.
    I highly recommend setting up a good custom prompt in API Settings, messing with settings, and editing messages that the bot sends.

  • Be warned that, like with ANY Ja
creator: Plaged0c
